string.name: eula_text
string.translation_description: A condensed, user-friendly version of the EULA and Privacy Policy with a link to the full terms

resources.string:
Welcome to Sky Map

To get you stargazing, please review this quick summary of our terms.

Privacy

We don\'t know who you are. We collect anonymous usage data to help us fix bugs and improve features. You can opt out of this at any time in the Settings menu.

Safety & Liability

Sky Map is provided \"as is.\" Use it safely—we aren\'t responsible for any damages or injuries (like neck ache!) resulting from your use of the app.

Open Source

Sky Map is a labor of love. You are free to use our source code, but please respect our branding and logos.

Read the full legal document here: Full Terms and Privacy Policy

By clicking \"Accept,\" you agree to these terms.
